description: Retrofit the theoretical bare-airframe rocket design with necessary flight hardware. Add two Launch Guides (Rail Buttons) to the exterior of the booster body tube and a 45-gram Mass Component named 'Altimeter' to the avionics/payload bay. Save the updated design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/flight_ready_retrofit.ork. Generate an integration report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/hardware_penalty_report.txt documenting the added components, the simulated maximum altitude, maximum velocity, and stability margin. Include an explanation of the altitude decrease relative to a bare airframe, specifically addressing parasitic drag and added mass.
